name: Arizer Dome Screen Pack
summary: Arizer Dome Screen Pack — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Official Arizer Dome Screen Pack is specially designed to be used with Glass Elbow Adapter and Glass mini whip, making it compatible with Arizer XQ2 / Extreme Q / V-Tower. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
